title: Logical Redstone Helper (LRH)
description: Adds awesome things for computational / logical redstone
body:
# Logical Redstone Helper (LRH)
> Made by rugmj

- /bintodec - Converts a binary value to decimal
- /dectobin - Converts a decimal value to binary
- Autodust - Automatically places redstone dust ontop of wool blocks when enabled, toggle it with the keybind
